description: Tool execution value objects — call representation, definition schema, results, execution modes, provider request/result, and before/after hook contexts.

files.responsibility: Represents a tool call — toolCallId, toolName, arguments, orderIndex.
Tool schema definition — name, description, JSON schema. toProviderPayload() for LLM format.
Tool execution result — toolCallId, toolName, content parts, details, error flag.
LLM provider request override — model, input, options. applyOn() for partial overrides.
Resolved model for a request — model name and options.
Raw platform invocation result — assistantMessage, deltas, usage, stopReason, error.
Context for before-tool-call hook — assistantMessage, toolCall, args, context.
Result of before-tool-call hook — allow() or blocked(reason) factory methods.
Context for after-tool-call hook — assistantMessage, toolCall, args, result, isError, context.
Result of after-tool-call hook — content/details/error overrides via factory methods.
